title: D&D 5e 2024 Feats Index
description: Complete index of all available feats organized by category

origin.name: Origin Feats
origin.description: Feats available at character creation through backgrounds

feats.name: Alert
feats.summary: Increase Initiative and immunity to surprise

feats.name: Magic Initiate
feats.summary: Learn spells from another class's spell list

feats.name: Savage Attacker
feats.summary: Reroll damage dice once per turn

feats.name: Skilled
feats.summary: Gain proficiency in three skills of your choice

general.name: General Feats
general.description: Feats available at levels 4, 8, 12, 16, and 19 when you gain an Ability Score Improvement

feats.name: Ability Score Improvement
feats.summary: Increase ability scores or gain a skill proficiency

feats.name: Grappler
feats.summary: Enhanced grappling abilities and advantage on attacks

fightingStyle.name: Fighting Style Feats
fightingStyle.description: Feats that grant fighting styles, available to characters with the Fighting Style feature

feats.name: Archery
feats.summary: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons

feats.name: Dueling
feats.summary: +2 damage when wielding one weapon with no shield

feats.name: Great Weapon Fighting
feats.summary: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage with two-handed weapons

feats.name: Protection
feats.summary: Use reaction and shield to impose disadvantage on attacks

feats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
feats.summary: Add ability modifier to off-hand weapon damage

epicBoon.name: Epic Boon Feats
epicBoon.description: Powerful feats available at 19th level and beyond

feats.name: Boon of Combat Prowess
feats.summary: Ability score increase and extra attack once per turn

feats.name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
feats.summary: Ability score increase and bonus action Misty Step

feats.name: Boon of Fate
feats.summary: Ability score increase and reroll reaction

feats.name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
feats.summary: Ability score increase and force damage weapon strikes

feats.name: Boon of Night Spirit
feats.summary: Ability score increase and invisibility in darkness

feats.name: Boon of Spell Recall
feats.summary: Ability score increase and chance to not expend spell slots
